title: ANC - UI
scenario: Transparency Environment and Speech sub-settings remain disabled/greyed out when ANC/Adaptive is enabled by default
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected Poly audio device.
4. Tap on ANC (Active Noise Cancellation) to open the ANC/Transparency screen.
5. Observe the default state of the screen.
expected: The ANC/Transparency screen shows two sections: ANC and Transparency. ANC is ON by default with Adaptive mode selected ("Automatically adjusts to provide the best ANC experience") and Standard mode available ("Provide a more natural audio experience and enhanced sidetone comfort"). Transparency is OFF by default with both Environment ("Optimized to hear your surroundings") and Speech ("Best for face-to-face communication") options disabled/greyed out.
